chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 769 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3064/2019 (Ex.) 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.3065/2019 (Stay) 05.03.2024 This petitioner was filed on 03.05.2019. Since then, no one has taken any interest to pursue it and get the notice issued even. Today also, no one is present and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
